svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="梯度加压拐点" id="lt2"> <mxGraphModel dx="-444" dy="-147" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="900" pageHeight="400" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="axis" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;fontColor=#64748b;fontSize=11;" value="并发用户数 →" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="200" x="350" y="340" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="yaxis" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;fontColor=#64748b;fontSize=11;" value="P99 延迟 ↑" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="100" x="20" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="d1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="1k
200ms" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="100" x="120" y="260" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="d2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="5k
280ms" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="100" x="250" y="240" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="d3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#b45309;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="10k
450ms
⚠ 缓存命中率掉" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="120" x="380" y="200" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="d4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#b91c1c;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="15k
1.2s
🔴 支付超时" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="120" x="530" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="d5" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#b91c1c;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="25k
雪崩" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="100" x="680" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="d1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#2563eb;endArrow=block;" target="d2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="d2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#2563eb;endArrow=block;" target="d3"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" edge="1" parent="1" source="d3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#b91c1c;endArrow=block;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" target="d4" value="非线性塌方"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e4" edge="1" parent="1" source="d4" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#b91c1c;endArrow=block;" target="d5"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="note" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;fontStyle=2;" value="拐点在 10k→15k 之间：P99 从 450ms 跳到 1.2s。跳过中间档直接压 25k，只能看到「挂了」，看不到「在哪个量级挂的」。" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="740" x="80" y="360" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.div: 拐点在 10k→15k 之间：P99 从 450ms 跳到 1.2s。跳过中间档直接压 25k，只能看到「挂了」，看不到「在哪个量级挂的」。
